title: Personal Armory
description: Unique Commissioned items for Hypixel Skyblock
body:
# Personal Armory

Personal Armory is a Minecraft resource pack that adds unique commissioned items for Hypixel Skyblock. Items are retextured based on UUID, which means that if you commission a texture to be added into the pack, you get to choose the specific item you want to be retextured and anyone else who has the item will not get to use it. Players will be able to show off their commissioned items and armor to others as long as both people use using the same pack.

**This pack requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloadx?f=preview_OptiFine_1.8.9_HD_U_M6_pre2.jar&x=26aad7da3ca371f500490c5b7b804edb) on 1.8.9, and [Firmament](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament) on 1.21+. The pack supports both versions at the same time.**

---
If you would like to get your very own custom item or armor set, join the Discord linked below and read the information channels.

[https://discord.gg/eD4w25mg7B](https://discord.gg/eD4w25mg7B)
